title: Middle Eastern Cuisine
description: This mod adds a few new middle eastern food items
body: This mod adds 4 new food items: Waraga Enob, Sambosa, Shawerma, and Kofta as well as a cook book to help with making them. The recipe for the cook book is a normal book and orange dye. I will be updating it regularly to include other items in middle eastern culture. Notably middle eastern structures to act as dungeons . The foods also have different effects also giving them a use in regular gameplay. Eventually I plan to add different aspects of Middle eastern culture besides food. If you have any feedback or want to see anything added to this mod then contact my discord ---> Cuppa Milk#7705
